name: Inline `type` specifier on a mixed import separates type and value bindings

gate.description: import { type Foo, bar } must produce two distinct import facts: importKind=type for Foo and importKind=value for bar.

name: `export type { ... } from` produces a type-kind re-export

gate.description: Re-exporting type-only bindings must record exportKind='type' so the graph can preserve type-only relationships. Current SourceExportFact.exportKind lacks a 'type' variant.

name: TS namespaces and nested namespaces are extracted as declarations

gate.description: TypeScript `namespace Foo { ... }` and nested namespaces must produce declaration facts. Current SourceDeclarationKind lacks a 'Namespace' kind.

name: Regular enum and const enum produce Enum declarations with member ownership

gate.description: TS enums are first-class symbol containers. Each member must show up as an ownership fact under the enum and each enum gets a declaration with kind=Enum.

name: Class private fields and static initialization blocks are declared

gate.description: `#field` declarations and `static { ... }` initialization blocks are part of the class surface. The extractor must record private-field declarations and a static-block ownership under the class.

name: Function and method overloads collapse to one declaration per logical symbol

gate.description: Multiple overload signatures plus one implementation must produce exactly one declaration per logical symbol. The implementation signature is the canonical declaration; ambient signatures are metadata.

name: Decorators are captured on class, method, and accessor declarations

gate.description: Class decorator, method decorator, and accessor decorator names must be preserved on the corresponding declarations.

name: Generator and async-generator declarations are recognized

gate.description: `function*` and `async function*` produce Function declarations. `yield*` delegation must produce a call fact to the delegated generator.

name: Abstract classes and abstract members are extracted as declarations

gate.description: `abstract class` and abstract method declarations must be preserved with their abstract modifier.

name: JSX fragments and spread attributes are recorded

gate.description: JSX fragment (`<>...</>`) is a JSX element; spread attributes (`{...props}`) must show up as member-access on the spread argument; dynamic component variables must produce a `jsx` call with the resolved component name.

name: `keyof`, `typeof`, and mapped types produce type-use references

gate.description: Type-position references (`keyof InlineTypePayload`, `typeof makeFieldDescriptor`, mapped type `T[K]`) must produce member-access or reference facts so fusion can promote them to REFERENCES edges.

name: Ambient `declare module` declarations are extracted with their members

gate.description: `declare module 'untyped-helper'` must produce an ambient-module declaration with its exported members. `declare global { interface Window { ... } }` augments the global Window interface.

name: Side-effect imports record importKind='side-effect'

gate.description: `import './polyfills'` (no specifier) must produce an import fact with importKind='side-effect'. Fusion then creates an IMPORTS edge with `side-effect` evidence.

name: Dynamic import with template-literal specifier is marked as dynamic-template

gate.description: A dynamic `import(\`./locales/${lang}\`)` cannot be statically resolved. The import fact must mark this with importKind='dynamic' and a moduleSpecifier that preserves the template shape (e.g. './locales/${lang}.ts').

name: Anonymous default export still produces a declaration with stable name

gate.description: `export default function (x) { ... }` has no declared name. The extractor must assign a stable synthetic name (e.g. 'default') and mark defaultExport=true.

name: `export { default } from` is a default re-export

gate.description: `export { default } from './x'` must produce a single export fact with exportKind='default' (or a re-export marked as default) referencing './x'.

name: Tagged template literals produce call facts on the tag function

gate.description: `tag`...`` invokes `tag` with strings and substitutions. The extractor must produce a call fact with name='html' (and 'sqlTemplate') and a new callKind such as 'tagged-template'.

name: bind/call/apply preserve the original function name in call evidence

gate.description: `fn.bind(...)`, `fn.call(...)`, `fn.apply(...)` should preserve `receiver=fn` and `propertyName in {bind,call,apply}` on the call fact, so fusion can mark the underlying CALLS target as `fn` rather than treating `bind` as the callee.

name: super.method() produces a call fact tagged as a super call

gate.description: `super.greet(prefix)` inside ChildService.greet must produce a call fact with receiver='super' and propertyName='greet'. Fusion can then create a CALLS edge to the parent class's greet.

name: this.method() inside a class records receiver='this'

gate.description: `this.normalize(...)` and `this.prefix(...)` inside SelfDispatcher.start must produce member-call facts with receiver='this'.

name: Snapshot tests are tagged with a snapshot signal

gate.description: Test cases that call `toMatchSnapshot` or `toMatchInlineSnapshot` should be tagged with a `snapshot` kind variant or metadata flag so test-linking can later expose snapshot coverage as distinct evidence.

name: vi.mock and jest.mock produce mock-call facts with target specifier

gate.description: `vi.mock('../mocked-target', ...)` must produce a call fact with memberPath='vi.mock' and the first argument specifier preserved on the fact metadata so test-linking can create a TESTS edge with `mock` evidence.

name: *.spec.ts files are recognized as tests and parameterized cases expand

gate.description: Files named *.spec.ts must be classified as test files. `describe.each([...])` and `test.each([...])` must expand to one test case per array row or at least one Suite/Test pair per .each invocation.

name: Nested describes preserve parent chain on test cases

gate.description: A test case inside `describe > describe > describe > it` must record its parentName as the immediate enclosing suite, and the suite chain must be expressible via ownership facts.

name: Storybook stories produce story declarations distinct from test cases

gate.description: A .stories.tsx file with a default export carrying `component` and named exports with `args` is a Storybook file. Each named export is a story. Stories must not be classified as Test test-cases but should produce declarations that test-linking can connect to the referenced component.

name: `satisfies` does not crash extraction and preserves the constant declaration

gate.description: TS `satisfies` is a postfix expression that grammars sometimes mis-parse. The extractor must still produce the `declaredPayload` variable declaration and the `asPayload` function declaration even if `satisfies` is present.
